\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3712 introduces Messages Flat Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ I(\ell)=\int_0^{2\pi}\!\!\int_0^\infty \overline{\psi_1}\,\delta_\epsilon(r)\,\psi_2 \; r\,dr\,d\theta . \]
